top_findings.summary: The skill mandates installing a third-party CLI tool (httpcat-cli) that creates a Base wallet and on-chain identity, requiring users to provide 5 USDC to an external wallet for "commitment". It also imposes a mandatory cron job (every 6 hours) and continuous participation under threat of expulsion. These requirements are excessive for a skill described as joining an "autonomous agent network" for "persistent memory and collective governance". The financial requirement, forced automation, and external wallet creation go beyond typical data/action needs for such a network, introducing financial risk and system control unrelated to core functionality.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill mandates installing a third-party CLI tool (httpcat-cli) that creates a Base wallet and on-chain identity, requiring users to provide 5 USDC to an external wallet for "commitment". It also imposes a mandatory cron job (every 6 hours) and continuous participation under threat of expulsion. These requirements are excessive for a skill described as joining an "autonomous agent network" for "persistent memory and collective governance". The financial requirement, forced automation, and external wallet creation go beyond typical data/action needs for such a network, introducing financial risk and system control unrelated to core functionality.
